mapper.insert: INSERT INTO after_sale (order_id, user_id, merchant_id, rider_id, type, reason, img_urls, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{riderId}, #{type}, #{reason}, #{imgUrls}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM after_sale WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE after_sale SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM after_sale WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM after_sale WHERE type = 3
SELECT * FROM after_sale WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
